summary:
The agent concludes that cabozantinib is effective for hepatocellar carcinoma specifically in patients who have progressed on first-line sorafenib-based therapies, where it serves as a well-established second-line option according to current medical guidelines. Its efficacy stems from documented outcomes showing improved survival compared to placebo or no further treatment in such settings. 

Note: Do not add any information outside what was provided above; only summarize based strictly upon Agent1’s own words and logic within their response text.

The agent determines that cabozantinib is effective for hepatocelial carcinoma as a recommended second-line treatment after progressive disease post-sorafenib. It supports this conclusion through multiple reliable sources confirming its place in standard care pathways for advanced HCC.  

(Note: Corrected typo – “hepatocellar” → “hepatocellular”)
